description: User finishes entering their mobile phone number into the input field
frame_description: The user types the remaining digits of their phone number, causing the error message to disappear and the submit button to become enabled.

description: User clicks the 'PROTECT MY ACCOUNT' button
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the purple 'PROTECT MY ACCOUNT' button just before it transitions to a loading state.

description: A loading spinner appears on the 'PROTECT MY ACCOUNT' button
frame_description: The button turns grey and displays a white loading spinner, indicating the request is being processed.

description: An error message 'Something Went Wrong' appears on the screen
frame_description: A red error box appears above the button stating 'Something Went Wrong. Please try again shortly or contact us for further assistance.'

description: User pauses to read the error message
frame_description: The screen remains static as the user likely reads the newly appeared error message.

description: User clicks the 'PROTECT MY ACCOUNT' button again after the error
frame_description: The user attempts to submit the form again by clicking the enabled purple button.

description: Loading spinner appears on the button again
frame_description: The button returns to a loading state for an extended period.

description: The page transitions to a loading screen for the next step of the process
frame_description: The previous form disappears, replaced by a loading screen with a house icon and the text 'Loading.... You're moving along nicely.'
